name: Qwen2-72B
note: Gen-2 flagship, 7T training tokens, 128K context; topped the HF Open LLM Leaderboard on release.
tpsNote: 72B dense weights exceed a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM even at Q4.

results.notes: Instruct variant, strict-prompt subset; same value on the blog and in the technical report Table 6
Instruct variant, MGSM 0-shot CoT, from the blog's multilingual-capability table

LogicKor official leaderboard, model_id Qwen/Qwen2-72B-Instruct (exact hf-link match), default prompt strategy [score corrected during adversarial verify: proposed 8.62 -> 8.61, per verifier: Fetched https://lk.instruct.kr/ directly (full leaderboard table, 253 rows) and confirmed the model/variant match: row #34 is "Qwen/Qwen2-72B-Instruct", 72B params, tongyi-qianwen license, prompt strategy "default" — exactly matching the claim's model_id and strategy. However the "총점" (total score) shown for that exact row is 8.61, not 8.62. Category breakdown for that row: 추론(reasoning) 8.92, 수학(math) 7.78, 글쓰기(writing) 8.92, 코딩(coding) 9.21, 이해(comprehension) 9.92, 문법(grammar) 6.92 — average = 51.67/6 = 8.6117, which the site itself rounds and displays as 8.61. No unit mismatch and no wrong-variant mixup: this is genuinely the base Qwen2-72B-Instruct (not a -VL, -Pro, or dpo/kor variant — those exist as separate rows #26/43/62 for 'denial07/Qwen2-72B-Instruct-kor-dpo' and are correctly not what's cited). Also verified there are two other prompt-strategy variants for the same base model on the same leaderboard (1-shot: 8.69, cot-1-shot: 8.46), so citing the specific "default" variant is correct and appropriately disambiguated — only the numeric score itself was mistyped/mis-rounded by 0.01. Correct value per the live site: 8.61.]

Qwen2-72B-Instruct, Chinese GaoKao aggregate, zero-shot CoT greedy decoding, from Table 4 (Chinese benchmarks) of the Qwen2.5-Math technical report, where Qwen2-72B-Instruct is used as a general-model baseline comparison row.

verificationNotes: Fetched qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen2/ and arxiv.org/abs/2407.10671 directly: confirms release 2024-06-07, 72.71B dense params, 128K context, Tongyi Qianwen License, ~30 languages. All 9 base-model rows (MMLU 84.2, MMLU-Pro 55.6, GPQA 37.9, HumanEval 64.6, MBPP 76.9, GSM8K 89.5, MATH 51.1, BBH 82.4, HellaSwag 87.6) appear verbatim on the blog. The 3 instruct rows are confirmed verbatim on the cited arxiv page, which states verbatim: 'Qwen2-72B-Instruct, attains 9.1 on MT-Bench, 48.1 on Arena-Hard, and 35.7 on LiveCodeBench.' No changes made.
